title: Roblio Darté
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Jedi |image=[[File:RoblioDarte.jpg]] |name=Roblio Darté |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]][[Purge (comic book)|''Purge'']] |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]][[Republic 61|''Republic'' 61]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=He/him |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Blond]] |feathers= |eyes=Blue |skin=Fair |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] *[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|We strayed from the path of the Jedi when we became generals, didn't we? I am not looking for vengeance, Bultar Swan. I am looking to make things right!|Roblio Darté to [[Bultar Swan/Legends|Bultar Swan]]|}} '''Roblio Darté''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] and [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] who fought in the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. He was noted for his skilled use of the [[Crossguard lightsaber/Legends|crossguard lightsaber]]. Though he survived [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]], he was killed during the [[Conclave on Kessel]] by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]. ==Biography== ===Early life=== A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]], Roblio Darté was [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], ascending to the rank of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] after completing his [[Jedi Trials/Legends|Trials of Knighthood]]. Proficient with a [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]], Darté crafted for himself a rarely-seen [[Crossguard lightsaber/Legends|crossguard]] variant with two blue blades. After further service to the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], Darté was promoted to [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] by the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]].''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ===The Clone Wars=== {{Quote|I can't believe that either side would have chosen Parcelus Minor for a battlefield. I can't think of a worse place for armies to engage.|Roblio Darté|}} [[File:Parcellus_Minor.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Roblio Darté amidst the flames of Parcelus Minor]] In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], when the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]] between the Republic and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] erupted into the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Darté took up the rank of [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]], leading [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] against the [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|Separatist Droid Army]]. Throughout the war between the Republic and the Separatist forces, he was sent to the swampy [[Battle of Parcelus Minor|battlefields]] of [[Parcelus Minor/Legends|Parcelus Minor]]. Due to the unstable surface of the planet, the Republic was unable to land any of their heavy equipment, and Darté and his troops found themselves fighting without transport or artillery. Worse yet, [[Republic Intelligence/Legends|Republic Intelligence]] vastly underestimated the number of Separatist forces on the planet, and Darté found his forces outnumbered ten to one. Completing the disaster, a CIS fleet arrived behind the small Republic fleet, trapping both the orbital support ships and the army planetside. Despite being wildly outnumbered, Darté and his clones held off the droid army for some time, while suffering heavy casualties in the process. Finally, the Separatist commander tired of the fight and ordered an [[Orbital bombardment/Legends|orbital bombardment]] of the planet. As the Separatist [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolasers]] bombarded the world, decimating Republic troops and Separatist [[Droid/Legends|droids]] alike, the [[tzeotine]] created by the native flora ignited, setting the entire planet aflame. Darté ordered his forces into a full retreat; attempting to save as many clones as possible, he was forced to leave large numbers of wounded troopers behind. Darté himself was wounded numerous times, and lost his left [[Eye/Legends|eye]]. In the end, over 90% of the [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] involved in the battle were killed, and it was later described by some as being close to a second [[Battle of Jabiim]]. Two days after the evacuation, Darté reported back to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] to report the disaster to the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|High Council]]. Within the [[Jedi Council Chamber/Legends|High Council Chamber]], the bandaged and scarred Darté knelt before the twelve Masters as he recounted the events. During his report, [[Senator/Legends|Senators]] [[Bail Prestor Organa/Legends|Bail Organa]], [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]], and [[Ask Aak/Legends|Ask Aak]] entered to listen, as the truth of the report had was largely downplayed by the media and the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]]. Senator Aak stormed out of the chamber, blaming the Jedi for the destruction of another world. ===The Great Jedi Purge=== {{Quote|We are here to save the Republic!''"
"''There is no Republic, Roblio Darté. The Republic'' chose ''to become an Empire,'' remember?'|Roblio Darté and Tsui Choi|}} [[File:MakisshaalasDeath-Purge.jpg|thumb|right|200px|Darté and the Jedi battle Vader.]] In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] of the Republic—secretly the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]]—issued [[Contingency Orders for the Grand Army of the Republic: Order Initiation, Orders 1 Through 150|Contingency]] [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]] to the Grand Army, commanding them to execute their Jedi Generals. Somehow, Darté survived the slaughter and went to ground, avoiding detection by the newly formed [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. In the [[Standard month/Legends|months]] following the downfall of the Order and the Republic, Darté was contacted by fellow Master [[Shadday Potkin/Legends|Shadday Potkin]], who wished to conduct a [[Conclave on Kessel|conclave]] with other survivors. Assembling in an abandoned mine on [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]], Darté and his compatriots discussed the future of the Order and the next course of action they should pursue. Their opinions covered a wide range; while Masters [[Bultar Swan/Legends|Bultar Swan]] and [[Tsui Choi/Legends|Tsui Choi]] argued against outright attacks against the Sith or the Empire, [[Koffi Arana]] offered the possibility that any action, even succumbing to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]], was worth the risk if they could take down the Sith. Darté and [[Ma'kis'shaalas]] landed in the middle of the argument, and Darté believed that justice needed to be served and the Republic revived. Master Potkin revealed that their arguments were a moot point, as she had assumed that they would discuss their options without acting, and thusly, she had chosen their course for them—the conclave was in fact a trap she had set to lure Sidious' [[Sith apprentice/Legends|Sith apprentice]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] to his [[Death/Legends|death]]. She had known that Vader was searching for [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], and so she leaked false information that he would be attending the conclave. Her goal was to weaken the [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] and the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]] while simultaneously letting [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] know that the Jedi still lived. As Choi reeled in shock over her decision, Potkin sensed Vader's arrival in the Force and urged the others to ready themselves. As the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] entered the chamber, demanding Kenobi, Darté and most of the Jedi attacked. [[Sia-Lan Wezz]] rushed ahead of the others and was [[Shiak|stabbed]] through the chest by Vader. Darté, Arana, and Ma'kis circled Vader, but the Dark Lord [[Telekinesis/Legends#Force Push|pushed]] Arana across the chamber and [[Shiim/Legends|sliced]] through Ma'kis's chest, killing him. Farr managed to wound Vader with a strike to the back, but Vader leaped away, followed by Potkin. Potkin had brought a [[Cortosis sword/Legends|cortosis blade]] to the battle, thinking it would give her the edge she needed to defeat Vader. She succeeded in deactivating his lightsaber, but Vader simply tossed the weapon aside and lifted Potkin with the Force and snapped her neck, then took her blade for himself. Darté, Farr, and Arana all attacked Vader again, but just as quickly had their lightsabers deactivated as well. Choi wisely jumped in and saved the others by [[Cho mai/Legends|severing]] Vader's hand while Swan slashed him along the leg, staggering him. Vader surrendered to the Jedi, but Arana believed it was a lie and demanded Vader's death. When Swan attempted to stop him, he took her lightsaber and gave in to his anger, killing her with her own blade. He launched himself at Vader, and Vader saw his chance, [[Telekinesis/Legends|flinging]] his own severed hand, still clutching the cortosis blade, into Arana's chest. Darté stood with the other two surviving Jedi, Choi and Farr, assaulting Vader by levitating rocks and equipment and throwing them at him. Vader was unable to overcome their combined [[Force power/Legends|power]], and succumbed to the attack, falling to his knees. [[File:RoblioDarteDeath-Purge.jpg|thumb|left|200px|The death of Roblio Darté]] Choi decided that Arana may have been right, and approached Vader, preparing to kill him after all. At that moment, [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] rushed onto the walkways above, and began to fire on the Jedi. Darté was able to lift a large piece of metal with the Force, blocking their blaster bolts. While Choi likewise blocked the attack with his lightsaber, Farr was not as quick, and was shot through the head and chest. Darté urged Choi to flee while he could, but Choi thought the opposite, and launched himself at the stormtroopers and told Darté to run instead. Vader caught Choi with the Force before he could attack the stormtroopers, who in turn killed the [[Aleena/Legends|Aleena]]. Darté screamed Choi's name as he too was cut down, shot multiple times in the chest, killing him. ===Legacy=== {{Quote|A story is now spreading that you tracked down a nest of Jedi traitors—fifty in all—and killed them. Every last one. By yourself.|Emperor Palpatine|}} The stormtroopers had arrived by orders of Emperor Palpatine, who knew of Vader's personal ambitions to hunt down Kenobi. Though Vader was ashamed that he had disobeyed his master's orders, Palpatine told him that battle was going to be used for Imperial propaganda. The lies the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]] would spread would strike fear into their enemies while driving any other surviving Jedi further into hiding. ==Behind the scenes== Roblio Darté is the creation of [[John Ostrander]]. While the character's first appearance was in [[Republic 61|''Republic'' 61]] and his name appeared in the comic's script, it was not until [[Purge (comic book)|''Star Wars: Purge'']] that the name was made [[Star Wars Legends|canonical]]. Ostrander speculated that Darté was born in [[50 BBY/Legends|50 BBY]].{{JCFCite|url=posts/21973967|board=Literature|thread=Getting to know the EU Jedi (John, Jan, Davide, Randy--feel free to help!)|user=[[John Ostrander|jfostrander]]|date=2005-10-17|time=8:43 AM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20180622020335/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/getting-to-know-the-eu-jedi-john-jan-davide-randy-feel-free-to-help.21960714}} Darté is the first character to be seen with a forked lightsaber; a smaller blade angles off the main blade at the hilt. This unique weapon is visible in ''Republic 61: Dead Ends'' and ''Star Wars: Purge''. The smaller blade appears in ''Purge'', but in several panels is colored as if it were part of the hilt. ==Appearances== *[[Republic 61|''Republic'' 61]] {{1st}} *[[Purge (comic book)|''Purge'']] {{1stID|Roblio Darté}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *{{InsiderCite|155|Launchpad|Launch Pad}} ==Notes and references== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Roblio Darté}} {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{JCFCite|url=threads/5863919|board=Authors and Artists|thread=The Official John Ostrander Discussion Thread|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20171102154950/http://boards.theforce.net/threads/the-official-john-ostrander-discussion-thread.5863919}} {{Interlang |de=Roblio Darté#legends |es=Roblio Darté |nl=Roblio Darté |pl=Roblio Darté |pt=Roblio Darté |deGA=1 }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Darté, Roblio}} [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Jedi Generals]] [[Category:Jedi Purge victims]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Post-Ruusan Jedi Masters]]
